items.title: 石油价格的战争驱动性波动吸引了历史最高的零售资金，推动了“膜状”式交易。
items.summary: 据Vanda Research统计，3月12日油价ETF的零售买入额创下历史新高，达到2110万美元，超过了2020年5月市场动荡期间的前高。
items.title_en: Oil’s war-driven volatility pulls in record retail money, fueling 'meme-style' trading
items.summary_en: Net retail buying of oil ETFs hit a record $211 million on March 12, surpassing the previous peak seen during the market turmoil in May 2020, according to Vanda Research.

items.title: 民主党人批评FCC主席卡尔（Carr）对广播许可证的威胁是反第一修正案的、极权主义的。
items.summary: 卡尔在周六批评了广播公司，刚刚在唐纳德·特朗普总统呼吁后，特朗普称伊朗击落五架美国油轮飞机的报道是“假新闻”。
items.title_en: Democrats blast FCC Chair Carr's broadcast license threats as anti-First Amendment, 'totalitarian'
items.summary_en: Carr on Saturday blasted broadcasters shortly after President Donald Trump called reports that Iran struck five U.S. tanker planes "fake news."

items.title_en: Oil prices fall as Trump pressures allies to help protect tankers in Strait of Hormuz
items.summary_en: The U.S. strikes on Kharg Island and Trump's threat to hit Iran's oil infrastructure mark a major escalation in the war, according to JPMorgan.

items.summary_en: The White House believes tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz will increase before Navy escorts are deployed, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said.

items.summary_en: Trump's comments come after he called on several countries to send warships so as to secure the critical waterway

items.summary: 伊朗寻求测试一座已将自己定位为中东地区最安全的东西方桥梁的国家——该地区的未来。

items.title: 特朗普-习近平峰会可能延期，如果特朗普想留在华盛顿参加伊朗战争。
items.summary: 特朗普的访问，预计于3月31日至4月2日举行，将是美国总统自2017年以来首次访问该国。
items.title_en: Trump-Xi China summit may be delayed if Trump wants to stay in Washington for Iran war: Bessent
items.summary_en: Trump's visit, scheduled for March 31-April 2, would be the first for a U.S. president since he went to the country in 2017.

items.title: 欧洲市场反弹，石油价格仍在关注之中
items.summary: 欧洲股市周一早盘部分回吐了早些时候的跌幅，中东局势持续不稳和全球油价上涨使得投资者情绪低迷。
items.title_en: European markets regain footing as oil prices remain in focus
items.summary_en: European stocks pared some early losses on Monday morning as the ongoing unrest in the Middle East and elevated global oil prices weighs on investor sentiment.

items.title: 霍尔木兹海峡对峙使美国的普通药品处方供应面临风险
items.summary: 美国一半的普通药物由印度制造，通过霍尔木兹海峡运输。供应链正在为紧急情况做准备，但处方储备有限。
items.title_en: Strait of Hormuz standoff puts supply of America's generic drug prescriptions at risk
items.summary_en: Half of US generic drugs are made in India and transit the Strait of Hormuz. Supply chains prepare for emergencies, but prescription stockpiles are limited.

items.title: 策略师提供了伊朗战争持续时间的公式
items.summary: 伊朗无法承受更多的轰炸，一个策略家认为，世界其他地区最终将协调回应，从而最终消除伊朗的杠杆作用。
items.title_en: Strategist provides a formula for how long the Iran war lasts
items.summary_en: Iran cannot withstand much more of the bombing, a strategist contends, and the rest of the world will eventually coordinate a response, thereby eventually eliminating Iran’s leverage.

items.title: “这都关于石油了”：联邦快递的运输成本将是本周的财报的关键
items.summary: 本周FedEx和零售名牌如Lululemon和Macy的财报将公布，我们可能会听到更多关于消费者态度的信息，因为汽油价格和运费成本在飙升，而中东冲突也在扩大。
items.title_en: ‘It’s all about oil’: FedEx’s transportation costs will be key to this week’s earnings
items.summary_en: With results due this week from FedEx and retail names like Lululemon and Macy’s, we’ll likely hear more about consumers’ attitudes, as gas prices and shipping costs spike and the conflict widens in the Middle East.

items.title: 贝森特表示美国财政部没有干预石油商品市场，也没有权力干预。
